segments.text: In Bhopal, 'Kaleji Anas ki Kheer' is made with goat liver and pineapple.
Fish Lukma in Bhopal are gulab jamuns made with boiled fish and milk.
Lucknow is famous for 'Ande ka Halwa' (egg halwa).
'Murg Zarda' is sweet rice served with chicken, common at some Muslim weddings.
Goa's traditional Baath cake was originally made with goat milk.
